It is also so convenient to use.', confidence=1.0, corroboration_count=1), FieldReportEntry(field_path='member_sentiment.common_complaints', category='member_sentiment', status='extracted', value='wishlist issues (auto-refresh, navigation), wrong product delivery, return refusal, inability to change return pick-up location, poor customer support', source_urls=['https://apps.apple.com/us/app/myntra-fashion-shopping-app/id907394059?see-all=reviews&platform=ipad'], source_snippet="Seriously, whats wrong with myntra's wishlist! I have been a loyal customer of myntra for so long but I must say that myntra has never been this unfriendly. Talking about the wishlist, one, it auto refreshes after every one minute or even less which takes you back to the first product. Earlier it used to refresh itself every 10 secs and I feel recent myntra update has increased the refresh time a bit but the defect is still there. Second, if you choose to see a particular product in the wishlist and then press the back button, it again takes you back to product one! Instead it should route the users back to where they left. How are we supposed to add our favourite items to the bag in this case. Are we supposed to scroll down again and again to the product we want to choose or are we not supposed to add more than 3-4 items in the wishlist to avoid the pain of scrolling down. Since it is purely mobile based now, the wishlist needs to be improvised first and foremost for the users to have a better shopping experience.

- I have been using mantra for more than 5 years now and I would recommend friends and family to shop on mantra till the time I faced issues and it was not handled in a good way. I was sent the wrong product and when I tried toreturn the item Myntra would not accept the return and said they sent the correct product. Another issue I ran into was not able to change the return pick-up location. I don't understand how an online platform can‘t be flexible with little things like a change of address which creates a lot of hassle for the Customers. There might be more underlying issues so I would rather use a different app.

# Everything is good till you run into a problem. Worst customer support






I have been using mantra for more than 5 years now and I would recommend friends and family to shop on mantra till the time I faced issues and it was not handled in a good way. I was sent the wrong product and when I tried toreturn the item Myntra would not accept the return and said they sent the correct product. Another issue I ran into was not able to change the return pick-up location. I don't understand how an online platform can‘t be flexible with little things like a change of address which creates a lot of hassle for the Customers. There might be more underlying issues so I would rather use a different app.

- I had three orders delivered that were different from what I had ordered. When I used the app options to return them, the delivery person refused to pick them up saying they are different and to contact customer service (even though the option selected for return was that I received a product that didn’t match description.) I have since contacted customer service multiple times and been told that it will get resolved soon, but it hasn’t been so far. It’s now been almost two months. Also, I am a Myntra insider based on the amount of orders I had placed and I still get this kind of service. Now I am considering not buying anything from Myntra again.", confidence=1.0, corroboration_count=1), FieldReportEntry(field_path='member_sentiment.sources_checked', category='member_sentiment', status='extracted', value=['apple app store'], source_urls=['https://apps.apple.com/us/app/myntra-fashion-shopping-app/id907394059?see-all=reviews&platform=ipad'], source_snippet='# Requires a few modifications', confidence=1.0, corroboration_count=1), FieldReportEntry(field_path='competitive_position.key_differentiators', category='competitive_position', status='extracted', value='100% free — no subscription fee ever; monthly savings of ₹500 on insider day; unlimited free shipping; early access is genuinely useful during eors; partner perks cover fitness, food, and health; birthday deals feel personalised and useful; auto-enrolment — no paperwork or app steps', source_urls=['https://zoutons.com/news/myntra-insider-vs-regular-account-is-it-worth-upgrading-in-2026'], source_snippet='✅ Pros of Myntra Insider

- 100% free — no subscription fee ever
- Monthly savings of ₹500 on Insider Day
- Unlimited free shipping saves ₹40–₹80 per small order
- Early access is genuinely useful during EORS
- Partner perks cover fitness, food, and health
- Birthday deals feel personalised and useful
- Auto-enrolment — no paperwork or app steps', confidence=1.0, corroboration_count=1), FieldReportEntry(field_path='competitive_position.weaknesses', category='competitive_position', status='extracted', value="insider day ₹500 cap limits high-cart savings; returns reduce qualifying spend — downgrade risk; partner perks vary; not always relevant to all buyers; icon tier needs ₹50k/year — niche for most shoppers; supercoins earning rates aren't publicly listed per tier; tier downgrades happen silently — check app regularly", source_urls=['https://zoutons.com/news/myntra-insider-vs-regular-account-is-it-worth-upgrading-in-2026'], source_snippet="❌ Cons / Things to Watch

- Insider Day ₹500 cap limits high-cart savings
- Returns reduce qualifying spend — downgrade risk
- Partner perks vary; not always relevant to all buyers
- Icon tier needs ₹50k/year — niche for most shoppers
- SuperCoins earning rates aren't publicly listed per tier
- Tier downgrades happen silently — check app regularly", confidence=1.0, corroboration_count=1), FieldReportEntry(field_path='competitive_position.closest_competitors', category='competitive_position', status='ambiguous', value=None, source_urls=['https://zoutons.com/news/myntra-insider-vs-regular-account-is-it-worth-upgrading-in-2026'], source_snippet=None, confidence=None, corroboration_count=0)] extracted_count=26 ambiguous_count=2 not_found_count=3 flagged_count=0

brief_id='brief_b1b801fbdb894d438752e028638cd1e8' run_id='run_5706f6b4698e411db050be286b7cac3b' brief_text="# Myntra Insider (Myntra) — Loyalty Intelligence Brief


**Program Overview.**
- Program Name: myntra insider
- Brand: myntra
- Industry: e-commerce
- Program Type: loyalty program
- Geography: india
- Membership Count: 6800000

**Earning.**
- Base Earn Rate: supercoins accumulation
- Non Transactional Earn: performing certain activities available on the insider dashboard, under the 'earn’ tab

**Redemption.**
- Redemption Options: ['cashback', 'vouchers']
- Redemption Thresholds: 500 supercoins for a ₹500 myntra gift card
- Point Value Cpp: 1.0
- Expiry Policy: points expire 12 months from the date of earning

**Tier Structure.**
- Tier Names: ['elite', 'icon', 'select']
- Qualification Criteria: shopping worth rs 7,000 (net of returns) and made a minimum of 5 orders in the last 12 months
- Tier Benefits: ['elite: 10% insider day discount', 'elite: all select benefits', 'elite: birthday month special deals', 'elite: exclusive partner rewards', 'elite: higher supercoins earnings', 'elite: priority customer support', 'icon: 15% insider day discount', 'icon: all elite benefits', 'icon: cleartrip travel deals', 'icon: curated & exclusive rewards', 'icon: direct discounts on select items', 'icon: priority everything', 'icon: vip early sale access', 'select: 5% insider day discount', 'select: early sale access', 'select: exclusive rewards catalogue', 'select: free delivery (no min order)', 'select: style tips & masterclasses', 'select: supercoins earning']
- Qualification Period: rolling 12-month window

**Partnerships.**
- Partner Names: ['flipkart']
- Partnership Type: marketing automation platform partnership
- Details: ['supercoins can be spent on both myntra and flipkart.']

**Digital Experience.**
- Mobile App Available: yes
- App Ratings: ['4.6 on google play']

**Member Sentiment.**
- Common Praise: great app, wide range of products, discounts offered, convenient to use
- Common Complaints: wishlist issues (auto-refresh, navigation), wrong product delivery, return refusal, inability to change return pick-up location, poor customer support
- Sources Checked: ['apple app store']

**Competitive Position.**
- Key Differentiators: 100% free — no subscription fee ever; monthly savings of ₹500 on insider day; unlimited free shipping; early access is genuinely useful during eors; partner perks cover fitness, food, and health; birthday deals feel personalised and useful; auto-enrolment — no paperwork or app steps
- Weaknesses: insider day ₹500 cap limits high-cart savings; returns reduce qualifying spend — downgrade risk; partner perks vary; not always relevant to all buyers; icon tier needs ₹50k/year — niche for most shoppers; supercoins earning rates aren't publicly listed per tier; tier downgrades happen silently — check app regularly" cited_claim_ids=[] word_count=393 entailment_passed=False unsupported_sentences=[]
